item.title: 🛠️ GitHub Action Bot 自动化管理仓库入门
item.description: 从我的《历史上的今天》项目，分享 CS Amateur/Enthusiast 大学生如何初步利用 Action Bot 自动化远端仓库，以及需要当心的坑。

item.title: 🐈 ArkPets suspense puzzle game
item.description: Proof of Work of a html + js puzzle-game exercise, powered by openrouter, spine-ts, opencv and d3. This project began as fabricating Arknights’ spine-cpp locally, and turned into a full-on suspense game.

item.title: 💻 CSC3060 Week 10-11 Memory Hierarchy
item.description: CUHKSZ 大二课程 CSC3060 的 Week 10-11 对第一周基础知识的延伸——电脑的记忆分区、阶级和缓存原理

item.title: 🎨 DDA3003 Midterm revision
item.description: CUHKSZ 选修课程 DDA3003 Visualization。期中复习 InfoVis, Tufte’s Design Principles, Gestalt Laws of encoding data, Visual perception, Color scheme, D3, HTML, CSS as well as Multivariate data cleaning, common tables and plots.

item.title: 💻 CSC3060 Week 8-9 Pipeline and Pipeline Hazards
item.description: CUHKSZ 大二课程 CSC3060 的 Week 8-9 理想流水线的实现、优点和潜在风险

item.title: 🎮 Super 'Emojio'
item.description: Proof of Work of a minimalistic html + js Super-Mario-type, rogue-like game

item.title: 💻 CSC3060 Project: Code Scheduling
item.description: CUHKSZ 大二课程 CSC3060 的 Project3，指令调度、DAG 依赖关系图等

item.title: 🕰️ 历史上的今天
item.description:
历史上的今天 (04-07)

  • 2022 — Ketanji Brown Jackson is confirmed for the Supreme Court of the United States, becoming the first black female justice.
  • 2021 — COVID-19 pandemic: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention announces that the SARS-CoV-2 Alpha variant has become the dominant strain of COVID-19 in the United States.
  • 2020 — COVID-19 pandemic: China ends its lockdown in Wuhan.
  • 2020 — COVID-19 pandemic: Acting Secretary of the Navy Thomas Modly resigns for his handling of the COVID-19 pandemic on USS Theodore Roosevelt and the dismissal of Brett Crozier.
  • 2018 — Former Brazilian president, Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, is arrested for corruption by determination of Judge Sérgio Moro, from the "Car-Wash Operation". Lula stayed imprisoned for 580 days, after being released by the Brazilian Supreme Court.

数据来源：Wikipedia On This Day。每天 UTC+1 (北京时间 9 点) 更新。

item.description: CSC1003-JAVA 的第二份作业例题讲解。

item.title: # 《牧羊人》
item.description: 牧羊人是个精明人，他总是能从羊群身上获得最多价值。冬天，羊长出很多毛，他就把大半的毛都剃掉，薄利多销地卖与人。因为价格实惠，人们都赞不绝口，经常从他那里进货。但牧羊人告诉羊群这些毛是为了实现羊群富足的必要牺牲，他永远以羊群利益至上。之所以要把毛交给牧羊人是因为他是羊群的主心骨，带领羊群走向温饱。

item.title: 💻 CSC1003 LEC13-15 递归
item.description: 介绍递归，栈与堆，以及栈溢出

item.title: 📢 如何快速批量地将音频转文字？
item.description: 如何简单的不用 LLM，在 CLI 将本地音频文件转文字。

item.title: 💻 CSC1003 LEC10-12 Midterm Revision
item.description: 期中考试复习与模拟题

item.title: ☕️ 咖啡与OOP
item.description:
OOP(Object-Oriented Programming) 即面向对象编程。我们来了解 Java (不是指咖啡) 中的 OOP。它包括以下内容：

  • 类(Class)

  • 对象(Object) ≈ 实例(Instance)

item.title: 💻 CSC1003 TBL1 网络与计算机史
item.description: 讲座直接略过的互联网基础 —— LGU 完全没有网络相关的基础课，导致大家的相关知识储备薄弱。

item.title: 💻 CSC1003 LEC1~3 函数、数据类型与计算
item.description: CUHKSZ 大一课程 CSC1003（Java） 的入门

item.title: 🌐 IP地址与子网掩码
item.description: 240822，有几位同学在龙大的选课培训直播间提出几个网络问题 (见下图)。这时候大学尚未开学，且10.20.219.31 显然是个私有 IP 地址，不可能从外网直接访问。也就是说，只有当网络状态处于 10.0.0.0(即龙大的子网地址)时才可能访问。

item.title: 🌐 龙大邮箱抓取尝试
item.description: 未解决的 LGU 邮箱自动化尝试思路分享。

item.title: 🌐 在 cloudflare 部署 Hugo 构架博客的 manual
item.description: 一直听说建博客可以薅 github 和 cloudflare 羊毛，而且很容易实现。真正做一遍却过程曲折，网上的文章，有坑。

item.title: 📝 River Town: the Metaphor of Chapter VI. ‘Storm’
item.description: In Chapter six of River Town, the metaphor of “storm” is incredibly ingenious, much like the line from Border Town: “The heavy rain washed everything, yet it washed away nothing.” True, storms rinsed both HongKong and Fuling the night of HongKong’s handover to China. Yet only when people, like Andy in The Shawshank Redemption, allow the rain to cleanse the blockages and stubbornness deep within their souls, and reach their arms out to the sky, can they attain true liberation.

item.title: 📝 Grassroot HongKong
item.description:
What is HongKong? What is it in its pure form, in a most representative phrase, in just words without bias? No other place dare to utter before YauMaTei makes its point.

I find myself always agitated to be surrounded by old, down-to-earth, and perhaps dusty, dirty alleyways. It’s not just about the unique historic scent. Yet, still worth mentioning, the old city wall of Peking and the brick-stone alleys in Shanghai have been mostly arbitrarily wiped out, which makes this block in HongKong appears to be a solitary time-space isolated from the modern world.
